original text:
The Big Reveal on Saturday 21st November at 9am - Don't miss it! Join East Grinstead's Shopkeepers as they reveal their Christmas window displays.
East Grinstead Town Museum's latest exhibition is ‘Not Just "Jam & Jerusalem", Celebrating 100 years of the WI'. It runs until they close for Christmas on Sunday 13 December.
The new collection service for East Grinstead Business Association members is aimed at cost reduction. To find out more visit their stand at Open4Business on 22 October at the EG Sports Club or contact ian.hopping@auditel.co.uk.
